trickyParts: FileRegistry.Get reads both legacy RegistryEntry JSON format and new SessionEntry format — the port and dir JSON keys overlap so a single unmarshal handles both
HandleAgentMessage no-interest path changed from file-lookup-then-deliver to direct-deliver — behavior preserved because Deliverer.Deliver now does the single registry lookup internally
Integration tests needed significant rewrite: all registerFileSession calls removed, registerSession now uses KV+interest instead of file+interest, tests for file fallback removed
deviations: RegistryEntry type kept in session.go (not moved to file_registry.go) since it is in the same package and still used by test helpers
openQuestions: The envoy-plugin still writes file registry entries — a follow-up cleanup (#373 sub-item 6) should make the plugin respect ENVOY_SESSION_REGISTRY mode
